title: Asplenium woodwardioides
taxonomy: Asplenium woodwardioides is classified under the family Aspleniaceae and the order Polypodiales. This species belongs to the genus Asplenium, commonly known as the spleenwort ferns. Further classification within the species may include specific subcategories based on geographical variations.
